examples: But the more serious threat comes from semiautonomous machines over which humans retain nothing more than last-ditch veto power.
Semiautonomous work groups make decisions about managing and carrying out major production activities, but still get outside support for quality control and maintenance.
His business is now a semiautonomous piece of the New York City firm Tocqueville Asset Management.
To keep the acquired management teams happy, each brand was allowed to run itself in a semiautonomous way.
Zari is from Bajur, part of Pakistan's semiautonomous tribal region bordering Afghanistan.
